brand_identity.name: Young Editorial Club - JNV Sukma
brand_identity.mission: To unleash the creative potential of students through a vibrant, digital zine platform.

modes.gallery: Bento Grid - Mix of spans (col-span-4, col-span-6, col-span-8)
modes.article: Single column text with floating sidebar images

Button.style: bg-black text-white px-8 py-3 font-bold border-2 border-transparent hover:bg-[#CCFF00] hover:text-black hover:border-black transition-all shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)]

variants.outline: bg-transparent border-2 border-black text-black hover:bg-black hover:text-white

Card.style: bg-white border-2 border-black p-6 shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] hover:translate-x-1 hover:translate-y-1 hover:shadow-none transition-all

Badge.style: bg-[#3366FF] text-white px-3 py-1 font-mono text-xs uppercase tracking-wider border border-black transform -rotate-1

Input.style: bg-white border-2 border-black p-3 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#CCFF00] focus:border-black shadow-[2px_2px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)]

universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients. Use flat, bold colors.
Do not use rounded corners unless it is a specific 'sticker' element.
Use 2px black borders for almost all containers.
Ensure Hindi text (Rozha One) is 10-15% larger than English text for optical balance.
Animations should be snappy (duration-200), not smooth/slow.
Always use the 'Syne' font for headings.
In forms, labels should be bold and uppercase.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text on colored backgrounds meets APCA standards (Black on Neon Yellow is good).
accessibility.focus_states: Focus rings must be thick (2px-4px) and high contrast.

instructions_to_main_agent: You are building a 'Digital Zine'. Forget standard SaaS dashboards. Think 'Art School Project' meets 'Professional Archive'. Use the 'Syne' font aggressively. Use the 'border-2 border-black' utility everywhere. The 'shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)]' is your best friend. Make it raw but usable.
